name: web_scraper
description: Advanced web scraper that extracts clean article text, metadata, and structured content from web pages. Handles JavaScript-rendered pages, strips boilerplate navigation and ads, and returns clean readable content. Supports extracting links, images, and structured data.

url.description: The URL of the web page to scrape.

extract_mode.description: What to extract from the page: 'article' extracts main article content, 'full' returns all text, 'links' returns all hyperlinks, 'metadata' returns title/description/og tags only, 'structured' attempts to extract tables and lists.

follow_links.description: Whether to recursively follow and scrape linked pages. Defaults to false.

max_depth.description: Maximum recursion depth when follow_links is true. Defaults to 1.

timeout_seconds.description: Page load timeout in seconds. Defaults to 30.
